title: Block of Raw Ore - Smelting
description: Allows you to smelt all three Raw Ore Block variants exclusively in the Blast Furnace, with the same smelting time & xp yield as nine Raw Ore would have.
body:
Allows you to smelt all three Raw Ore Block variants exclusively in the Blast Furnace.
- Smelting one Raw Ore Block takes 45s, which is equal to the time it takes to smelt 9 Raw Ore (assuming you also smelt it in a Blast Furnace).
- as a result of this, the fuel cost also stays the same.
- Smelting one Raw Ore Block yields 6.3 xp-Points, 9x the 0.7 you get from smelting one Raw Ore (more on how experience from Smelting is calculated [here](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Smelting#Recipes)).
- Recipes for the respective processed Block are granted when the Raw Ore Block Variant is obtained.

![The GUI of a Blast Furnace, containing 20 coal in the fuel slot, one block of raw iron in the input slot, and two blocks of iron in the output slot. The Arrow showing the smelting progress indicates approximately 50% Progress, the flames that indicate the fuel level indicate, that approximately 25% of the previously used fuel source is left over. The Player Inventory cointains two Raw Gold Blocks and one Raw Copper Block, along some tools, blocks and food.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d1e68b6058432ba1f51b1e6f4d9e4fe5d40bff0_0.webp)

(If you have any Issues, please refer to my [Twitch](https://www.twitch.tv/LucySebast), I usually read all Messages within a few hours at most, even when offline, or alternatively, contact me via the social media linked [here](https://www.twitch.tv/LucySebast/about).)
